content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat at 24,225 with VIX elevated at 18.65. Strong sector rotation underway — PSU banks, power, pharma and FMCG showing sharp individual moves on earnings. Book is 79% deployed so priority is position management, not new entries. Multiple holdings have binary earnings events within 2-6 days (AUBANK Apr 25, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 28).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, NNPA 0.13%, CASA 52.5%). PSU bank sector at ATH. Down 3.5% from entry but thesis fully intact — earnings tailwind. Setting SL at 74 (below recent swing low 71-72 with buffer for volatility, ~6% risk from entry), target 88 (above 52w high). RR ~1.7:1 from CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat, GNPA 0.93% best-in-class, +11% today on volume. Trailing SL up to 955 (just below entry 984, protects against reversal while allowing breathing room; locks in no-loss floor). Target 1100 below analyst 1143. Current +2.8%, momentum strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position. Gold in INR terms supported by USD strength. SL 119.5 (~4.5% below entry) gives room, target 135 toward prior highs. Small -0.7% drawdown is noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to new 52w high on 2.3x volume. Trail SL to 1620 (below entry, locks in no-loss). Target 1820 conservative vs analyst 2000-2300. Power theme strong; summer demand catalyst. Q4 result is risk — watch for announcement."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1550.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Best quarter in 9 years — PAT +27%, revenue +23%, double-digit volumes. Fresh 52w high. SL 1340 (~5.2% below entry, below prior resistance now support). Target 1550. Strong fundamental momentum justifies holding through any pullback."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high, Q4 results April 25 (binary event). SL at 995 (~5% below entry), target 1140. Hold through earnings with tight risk — Q3 beat pattern + sector strength supports positive surprise odds, but stock has run hard. If post-earnings looks weak, exit at SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 760.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 29. USFDA Chantilly inspection closed with procedural-only 483s. Pharma theme in favor. SL 645 (~5.3% below entry), target 760. FDA Warning Letter at Gagillapur is a residual risk. Hold into earnings with defined risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 earnings Apr 28. Nestle set high bar but HUL benefits from rural recovery narrative. +5.9% today. SL 2260 (~4.7% below entry), target 2520. Defensive FMCG rotation play with earnings catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 445.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Top brokerage pick for summer. Multiple COD announcements, ESG upgrade. SL 385 (~4.8% below entry, below 20DMA), target 445 (mid of analyst range 400-460). Q4 results May 15. Defensive utility core holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 240.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Fresh ATH, +44% in April, Q4 earnings Apr 29. Shooting star candle on April 20 is caution flag. SL tight at 202 (~5.6% below entry) given extended move. Target 240. On ASM Stage 1 — reduced position sizing justified. Exit before Apr 29 if showing any reversal."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post-Q4 beat. Allow breathing room for PSU bank strength."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL up after +11% spike to protect gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing to near-entry to lock no-loss after breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-earnings breakout; ride momentum with defined SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "reasoning": "Binary Q4 event in 2 days; tight SL manages risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 on Apr 29; hold into results with defined risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 on Apr 28; defensive rotation favors holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Core defensive position, summer demand tailwind."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended move; tight SL given shooting star + ATH + ASM."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; hold through choppy gold action."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DATAPATTNS, DEEPAKNTR, ELECON — too extended after massive gap-ups; wait for consolidation. CESC — attractive power play but cluster already heavy (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER). IEX — BEARISH (CERC market coupling threat to DAM revenue); avoid. DRREDDY/CIPLA — monitor for pharma sector entries if GRANULES pharma thesis plays out. PIRAMALFIN — skip, cluster overlap with PNBHOUSING in NBFC/HFC space.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed — at the practical ceiling. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) = ~INR 168k deployed (~17% of portfolio), approaching cluster limit. Financial cluster (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) = ~INR 362k (~36% of portfolio) — this is tight, need to watch AUBANK Apr 25 earnings for exit trigger. No new entries today. Multiple earnings events clustered Apr 25-30 across the book — set SLs and let catalysts play out. If any 2-3 positions hit SL simultaneously, book cash aggressively to reduce correlation risk."
}
